block_00: Take a look at the top news of the week
block_03: Apple on Wednesday held its annual event, where it announced the new flagman products, including iPhone 14. The iPhone is a major money-maker for Apple, accounting for $191.97 billion of its $365.82 billion total revenue in fiscal 2021. That means the iPhone makes up 52% of Apple's revenue.
block_07: Share price skidded in Tuesday's session after Bank of America weighed in with a bearish call on the ride-hailing company. However, the price rose to a weekly high on Thursday – plus 19% this week.
block_10: The stock price gains but lags the market. On the next earnings report date, the company is projected to report earnings of -$0.06 per share. Anyway, the share price has fallen by 9% in one week.
